Subject: RE: MV HYDRUS AGENCY APPOINTMENT HAZIRA ADANI
 
DEAR MS.ELEANOR,
 
GOOD DAY
 
RYE-MAIL – PLS NOTE SINCE COURIER COMPANY ASK FOR TOO MUCH OF DOCUMENTS ALSO IT’S A VERY LENGTHY PROCEDURE AND FORMALITIES 
FOR LANDING BUNKER OIL SAMPLES FROM VSL AND ALSO EXPENSES INVOLVED. 
 
MOREOVER AFTER LANDING WE CANNOT ABLE TO SEND THE SAME TO ANY OTHER COUNTRIES BY COURIER AS THE COURIER SERVICES ALWAYS REQUIRED IEC CODE 
[IMPORT-EXPORT CODE] FOR SENDING THE SAMPLES, WHICH WE DO NOT HAVE AS WE ARE ONLY AGENTS [NOT EXPORTERS OR IMPORTERS] 
 
IN VIEW PLS MAKE IT CONVENIENT TO LAND THE SAMPLE AT YOUR NEXT PORT OF CALL 
 
 
PLS ACK
 
BEST REGARDS
SALIM
MOB: 91-9840400407
INFINITY SHIPPING PRIVATE LIMITED
AS AGENTS ONLY
